text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has invited me to a tea party at
the Mejiro family home today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are, Trainer! ...Wait a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I said you could wear your normal clothes. Don't
you have trouble breathing in that restrictive
suit?
choice_data_list:
I mean, this is a tea party with the renowned
Mejiro family, so...

I mean, this is a tea party with the renowned
Mejiro family, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see... What you're saying is that you're nervous.
In other words, this is an opportunity for me to
exhibit my skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Trainer. Simply follow my lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus, the tea party begins, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, the next step is to use your knife to spread
some jam and clotted cream onto your scone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... The jam and cream are glistening! They
look delicious...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Gah! N-now, take a bite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Quickly, now, before my stomach takes charge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I still have an important duty to fulfill! So, I must
refrain...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Household Staff
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, miss. Is now an okay time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, it's been a while, hasn't it? Yes, by all
means, allow me to introduce you to my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, state your name as you shake hands. There is
nothing more important to good manners than a proper
greeting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro McQueen's support, I follow the
proper manners in exchanging introductions with
the staff member.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew... You managed to do it correctly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to thank me. It was no trouble.
You and I are a team, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...You're unusually silent, Trainer. Is something
the matter?
choice_data_list: I was just thinking about how cool you are.

I was just thinking that I'd better up my game to
be fit to stand by your side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha?! C-c...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I mean, of course. I am a proud Mejiro, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But... "cool," you say? You really think so?
Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I suppose I must do my best and show you just how cool I really am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Umm... I suppose there was nothing to worry
about, but... I probably should announce my
presence, eh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
R-Ryan?! How long have you been standing
there?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well... I caught that whole "show you how cool I
really am" bit, if that's what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... You really laid it on thick there. Sheesh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-you have it all wrong! Please don't take that
remark as me being arrogant! I j-just got a little
carried away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen maintains as much "coolness" as
she can muster as she supports me through our
tea party.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I say you're good enough just the way you
are. Although, I would expect such a notion from
my trainer all the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I, as well, ought to respond in kind to that spirit
of yours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to instruct you on a variety of topics,
from the proper way to drink tea to making polite
introductions.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Today, I shall be the trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you're in a good mood, McQueen. Guess I
didn't need to worry after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Yes, I am giving my trainer my full support.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uhuh, good job, good job. ♪ I'd like to have a
little chat with your trainer too, in that case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, by all means.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The intensive training shall begin at once!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Mejiro McQueen continues to teach
me etiquette as we enjoy our tea party.
